title: Month & Week Moons
description: Changes the sky of the overworld by adding two new moons. Works only with Celestial mod!
body:
![Page Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ca53971ae80c4779dd63b255c9785d922190fef_0.webp)
### This is a resourcepack for [Celestial](https://modrinth.com/mod/celestial) that changes the sky in the overworld, adding two new moons, updating the sun and stars.

There are two moons nearby in the sky: Month (large) and Week (small).
Month is at the same distance as the standard Moon, and Week is closer to the planet.
New sun is an yellow star without name.

### All feature list

Stars:
- Stars of different colors: blue, red, white & yellow;
- Amount of stars is 2800 objects.

Month moon:
- Larger than Week;
- Bluer colour;
- Further.

Week moon:
- Smaller than Month;
- Rusty colour;
- Closer.

Star:
- Just a expanded Sun.

### Other

Resourcepack based on the [Realistic Night Sky Demo](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/celestial-demo-packs/files/5632283) from [Celestial Demo Packs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/celestial-demo-packs) by [fishcute](https://modrinth.com/user/fishcute).

See the image(s) in [gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/month-n-week-moons/gallery).
